result.name: Emperor’s new clothes
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Magical thread sewn onto armor Effect: For the next day, the armor the thread is attached to is invisible, making the wearer appear to be unarmored.

sections.name: Emperor’s new clothes
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6

Form: Magical thread sewn onto armor

Effect: For the next day, the armor the thread is attached to is invisible, making the wearer appear to be unarmored.
